title: Singularity
description: A small mod to find item singularities.
body:
## Singularity

A simple mod to help with item singularities (massive clumps of dropped items).

### Features

- Automatic scheduled item removal
- Farm leak detection
- Fully configurable
- Warns before clearing items
- Easy to set up
- Minimal dependencies (Only Architectury API and Cloth Config)
- Runs everything on a separate thread
- Very well optimized


### How To Use

There are two commands in this mod, `/singularity clear` and `/singularity detect`.

`/singularity clear` will clear ground items, showing detected singularities in the chat (to operators only by default). This will also dump a list of every cleared item's coordinates into a file in the `singularity/` directory in the server root.

`/singularity detect` will detect all singularities and show them in chat, and only to operators (by default).

### Dependencies

This requires [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api).
